interviewQuestions.title: Customer Validation Interviews
interviewQuestions.disclaimersContent:
Purpose:
The purpose of the interview is to help us gain a better understanding of...

Expectations:
• Throughout the interview if there's anything you don't feel comfortable responding to, feel free to let me know.
• There are no right or wrong answers. The goal of this interview is to hear your unique perspective about your experiences.
• I'll be taking notes throughout the interview, so if I am looking away from the camera, it means I'm busy typing.

Disclaimer:
Quick reminder, this session is recorded for referencing later. Can you please confirm you're happy for us move ahead.

chat.helpTurnIdea: I'll help you turn your idea into a complete business framework! Let's start with two quick questions.
chat.businessIdeaQuestion: 1. What's your business idea or product name? 💡
chat.launchLocationQuestion: 2. Where will you launch this business? 🌍
chat.ideaPlaceholder: e.g., AI-powered fitness app, Eco-friendly packaging startup...
chat.locationPlaceholder: e.g., United States, Europe, Saudi Arabia, Global...
chat.launchFirstPlaceholder: e.g., United States, Europe, Middle East, Southeast Asia...

reader.sampleContent1: This is the full article content that would be extracted from the original source using a content extraction API like Mercury Reader or Diffbot. The content includes the complete text, images, and formatting from the original article.
reader.sampleContent2: In a real implementation, this content would be fetched from the article URL and processed to remove ads, navigation, and other non-content elements, providing a clean reading experience within the platform.
reader.sampleContent3: The article extraction would preserve important formatting like headings, paragraphs, lists, and embedded media while ensuring fast loading and consistent styling with the platform's design.
